The '''60th [[Golden Globe Award]]s''', honoring the best in film and television for 2002, were held on January 19, 2003, in the [[Beverly Hilton Hotel]], [[Beverly Hills]], [[California]].<ref>{{cite news|last1=Baker|first1=Bob|last2=King|first2=Susan|title=Spreading the wealth|url=https://www.latimes.com/archives/la-xpm-2003-jan-20-et-baker20-story.html|access-date=10 January 2018|work=Los Angeles Times|date=20 January 2003}}</ref><ref>{{cite news|last1=Gray|first1=Tim|title=Jazzed about ‘Chicago’|url=https://variety.com/2003/film/awards/jazzed-about-chicago-1117879069/|access-date=10 January 2018|work=Variety|date=19 January 2003}}</ref><ref>{{cite news|last1=Lyman|first1=Rick|title='Chicago,' 'Hours' Win Top Golden Globe Awards|url=https://www.nytimes.com/2003/01/20/movies/chicago-hours-win-top-golden-globe-awards.html|access-date=10 January 2018|work=The New York Times|date=20 January 2003}}</ref> The nominations were announced on December 19, 2002.<ref>{{cite web|last1=Silverman|first1=Stephen|title='Chicago' Strikes Gold with the Globes|url=http://people.com/celebrity/chicago-strikes-gold-with-the-globes/|website=People.com|access-date=10 January 2018|date=19 December 2002}}</ref><ref>{{cite news|title=Chicago tops Globe nominations|url=https://news.bbc.co.uk/2/hi/entertainment/2588909.stm|access-date=10 January 2018|work=BBC News|date=19 December 2002}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|last1=Hiatt|first1=Brian|title=Here are the Golden Globe nominations|url=http://ew.com/article/2002/12/19/here-are-golden-globe-nominations/|website=Entertainment Weekly|access-date=10 January 2018|date=19 December 2002}}</ref><ref>{{cite news|title='Chicago' grabs 8 Golden Globe nominations|url=http://articles.cnn.com/2002-12-19/entertainment/golden.globe.nominations_1_drama-nominations-motion-picture-drama-drama-category?_s=PM:SHOWBIZ|access-date=10 January 2018|work=CNN|date=19 December 2002|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20121003192513/http://articles.cnn.com/2002-12-19/entertainment/golden.globe.nominations_1_drama-nominations-motion-picture-drama-drama-category?_s=PM:SHOWBIZ|archive-date=3 October 2012|url-status=dead}}</ref>

==Winners and nominees==

[[File:Nicole Kidman Cannes 2017 6.jpg|right|thumb|150px|[[Nicole Kidman]], Best Actress in a Motion Picture – Drama winner]]
[[File:Richard Gere by John Mathew Smith.jpg|right|thumb|150px|[[Richard Gere]], Best Actor in a Motion Picture – Musical or Comedy winner]]
[[File:Renée Zellweger Berlinale 2010 (cropped).jpg|right|thumb|150px|[[Renée Zellweger]], Best Actress in a Motion Picture – Musical or Comedy winner]]
[[File:Chris Cooper at the 2009 Tribeca Film Festival.jpg|right|thumb|150px|[[Chris Cooper]], Best Supporting Actor winner]]
[[File:Meryl Streep by Jack Mitchell.jpg|right|thumb|150px|[[Meryl Streep]], Best Supporting Actress winner]]
[[File:Michael Chiklis at PaleyFest 2014.jpg|right|thumb|150px|[[Michael Chiklis]], Best Actor in a Television Series – Drama winner]]
[[File:Edie Falco 2010 1 (cropped).jpg|right|thumb|150px|[[Edie Falco]], Best Actress in a Television Series – Drama winner]]
[[File:Tony Shalhoub (1).jpg|right|thumb|150px|[[Tony Shalhoub]], Best Actor in a Television Series – Musical or Comedy winner]]
[[File:JenniferAniston08TIFF.jpg|right|thumb|150px|[[Jennifer Aniston]], Best Actress in a Television Series – Musical or Comedy winner]]
[[File:Albert Finney 1966.jpg|right|thumb|150px|[[Albert Finney]], Best Actor in a Miniseries or Television Film winner]]
[[File:Uma Thurman Cannes 2011.jpg|right|thumb|150px|[[Uma Thurman]], Best Actress in a Miniseries or Television Film winner]]
[[File:Donald Sutherland - Monte-Carlo Television Festival.jpg|right|thumb|150px|[[Donald Sutherland]], Best Supporting Actor in a Series, Miniseries, or Television Film winner]]
[[File:Kim Cattrall 2012 (cropped).jpg|right|thumb|150px|[[Kim Cattrall]], Best Supporting Actress in a Series, Miniseries, or Television Film winner]]

These are the nominees for the 60th Golden Globe Awards. Winners are listed at the top of each list.
